statement.p: One telecom company charges a monthly fee of {\$34.95} and {\$4.90} for each Gigabyte (GB) of data transmitted. A rival telecom company charges a monthly fee of {\$39.95} and {\$3.90} for each GB of data transmitted. How many GB of data would you have to use for the monthly bill to be the same for the two providers? And what would that monthly bill be?
